name: clinic-management-system
description: Deployable full-stack doctor's clinic management starter with website, dashboards, appointment booking, and REST APIs.

scripts.check: node --check server.js && node --check src/app.js && node --check src/data/store.js && node --check src/middleware/auth.js && node --check src/routes/auth.js && node --check src/routes/appointments.js && node --check src/routes/catalog.js && node --check src/routes/dashboard.js && node --check src/routes/messages.js && node --check src/routes/payments.js
